description.line2: I turn your ideas into products that work, from the interface to the database.
description.line3: Contact me if you need my services.

about.title: About

frontend.title: Frontend Developer
frontend.description: Creation of high-performance, responsive web interfaces focused on user experience.

backend.title: Backend Developer
backend.description: Development of reliable and secure server-side solutions tailored to modern application needs.

architecture.title: Architecture & Best Practices
architecture.description: Implementation of solid architectures and development best practices for scalable and sustainable applications.

speech.p1: Passionate about technology for as long as I can remember, I decided to take the leap and make it my career by training as a web developer.
speech.p2: A graduate of the Web Developer program at OpenClassrooms, I tackled real projects from day one — no hollow theory, just genuine problems to solve, from front to back.
speech.p3: What I love most about this job? That moment when an idea becomes real. When a rough mockup turns into an application that runs, responds, and actually makes sense for the user. It's that blend of logic and creativity that drives me — and keeps me learning.

about.speechText: My CV is available directly on this portfolio —
about.speechEnd: if you'd like to learn more about my background.

subtitle.line1: A question? A project? Feel free to contact me,
subtitle.line2: I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

status.success: Message sent successfully! I’ll reply soon.
